g.text: WAL mode | Foreign Keys ON | Connection Pool
GlossaryBuildProgress table tracks phase/batch — resume from extraction/validation/translation
Vector similarity search injects relevant terms into LLM context for consistency
Overlap-aware chunking (500 token overlap) prevents context loss at boundaries
Protocol-based (NVIDIA NIM / Gemini / Ollama) — swap via CLI flag
Connection pool, foreign keys, concurrent read/write, JSON columns for contexts
Nested Progress contexts fixed — CLI shows live bars, logs to file in CI
Material Design, WebSocket progress, real-time glossary editing
NLTK NER + Fantasy-term dictionary + LLM validation (batched)
